_template_notes.description: MCP Server Configuration Template — Phoenix Toolbox
rules: NO hardcoded paths. Use environment variables with fallbacks.
NO credentials in this file. Use Azure Key Vault.
Paths should use $HOME, $PHOENIX_ROOT, or relative paths.
This file goes in the project root or capability directory.

stdio.description: Standard transport. Server runs as child process.

http.description: HTTP transport. Server runs as REST endpoint.
http.when_to_use: Cloud-hosted servers, shared services, Azure Functions

_path_conventions.PHOENIX_ROOT: Root of phoenix-toolbox repo. Falls back to $HOME/phoenix-toolbox.
_path_conventions.relative_paths: Preferred when server is inside the repo tree.

flow: 1. Store secret in Azure Key Vault
3. Server code retrieves secret at runtime via Key Vault SDK
4. Never log, print, or expose secrets
_credential_pattern.local_dev: Use 'az login' for local Key Vault access during development.

_alwaysAllow_notes.description: Tools that Claude can call without user confirmation.
_alwaysAllow_notes.default: Empty array — all tools require confirmation.
_alwaysAllow_notes.caution: Only allow tools that are read-only and safe. Never auto-allow write/delete operations.
